title: Korean-Style Egg Wrap
description: A twist on traditional wraps, this Korean-inspired recipe combines a crispy egg with fermented flavors.
instructions: 1. In a pan, scramble the egg over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped kimchi to the pan and stir to combine with the egg.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the gochujang sauce and a splash of water.
4. Add the sauce mixture to the pan with the egg mixture and stir to combine.
5. Warm the tortilla by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Spoon the egg and kimchi mixture onto the center of the tortilla.
7. Fold the bottom half of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder.
8. Slice in half and serve immediately.
